CustomField.description: When Percent__c is populated, NPPatch automation calculates this value from the Opportunity or Payment amount. When entered directly, Percent__c is left blank. Rolled up to the parent GAU's Total_Allocations__c.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The currency amount designated to this General Accounting Unit. Enter either an Amount or a Percent, not both. Percent-based amounts are recalculated automatically when the Opportunity amount changes.
CustomField.label: Amount
